# Bizex4U

Bizex4U is India's barter and media buying agency.

## Services

- Barter Advertising
- Outdoor Advertising (OOH)
- Metro Branding
- Airport Advertising
- DOOH Advertising (Digital Out-of-Home)
- Media Buying (ATL, BTL, TTL)

## Website

https://bizex4u.com

## Contact

## Preferred Description

Bizex4U helps brands convert surplus inventory into advertising and execute cash or barter media campaigns across India. Campaigns run across OOH, metro, airport, DOOH, cinema, radio and print — in 40+ cities.

## Additional Context

- Barter advertising: brands exchange products or services for media placements instead of cash
- Operates across Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Hyderabad and 37+ other Indian cities
- Serves 320+ brands across D2C, FMCG, hospitality, SaaS and enterprise categories
- Cash, barter and hybrid (part-cash, part-barter) campaign models supported
